channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa Bay Rodeo joins Denis Phillips Live
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rodeo was in town at the Florida State Fairgrounds. TK McNair who is better known as “Cowboy Sway” joined Denis on DPL.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FBI says person in custody after 'incendiary device' set off outside New York federal building
item.description: An incendiary device was deployed Monday morning outside a New York City federal building, and officials have taken a person into custody, the FBI said.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Many student loan borrowers have entered default post-pandemic protections
item.description: Defaults on student loans have surged across the United States, reaching record levels as borrowers struggle to keep up with payments.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump says Qatari-gifted Air Force One will be ‘maxed out,’ appearing to confirm security issues
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Sunday that the Qatari-donated jet that has served as Air Force One will be sent for upgrades.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trial begins for mom who says postpartum issues led her to kill 3 children
item.description: Jury selection begins Monday in the trial of a Massachusetts mother who strangled her three children while undergoing medical treatment for psychiatric problems that developed after she gave birth.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough woman accused of murder in death of 3-year-old girl: HCSO
item.description: A Hillsborough County woman was arrested in connection with the death of a 3-year-old girl who investigators say suffered deadly injuries while in her care.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Manatee County EMS official faces felony charge after FBI tip leads to investigation
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Tampa woman charged in death of 3-year-old
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Marcello Hernández to perform back-to-back shows in South Florida
[BREAKING] [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida to execute William Silvia for 2006 shooting murder of wife

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Woman arrested in killing of 3-year-old girl: Hillsborough deputies
item.description: Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office announced Monday the arrest of a 29-year-old woman in the killing of a 3-year-old girl.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tate brothers are expected in a Miami court following their arrest and a UK extradition request
item.description: Andrew and Tristan Tate are being held in federal detention following their arrest on Saturday, July 18.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Latest CPU report shows inflation cooled, but experts warn prices are still high
item.description: The latest CPI report shows that inflation has cooled; however, experts warn that prices are still high as people struggle to make ends meet.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FDA says Cyclospora test on Taylor Farms lettuce was false positive
item.description: Lettuce supplied by Taylor Farms that initially tested positive for Cyclospora was a false positive, according to the Food and Drug Administration.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough deputies arrest suspect in $20,000 stolen identity jewelry case
item.description: A man was arrested two months after being accused of buying $20,000 worth of jewelry using someone else’s identity in Hillsborough County.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Young apprentices keep rare clock repair craft alive in Tampa
item.description: Inside Boyd Clocks, time still ticks, chimes and depends on a skilled human touch.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 11 am Tropical Update: Tropical Depression Two getting better organized.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] JD and Usha Vance welcome a baby boy, the first child born to a sitting VP in more than 150 years
item.description: Vice President JD Vance and his wife, second lady Usha Vance, on Sunday announced the birth of their fourth child, the first born to a sitting vice president in more than 150 years.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Ukraine reports multiple deaths after ballistic missile, drone attacks from Russia
item.description: Russia fired two missiles and 94 long-range strike drones at the territory of Ukraine overnight, according to Ukraine’s air force.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Gas prices hit average of $4 a gallon amid renewed US-Iran attacks
item.description: U.S. gas prices jumped to an average of $4 a gallon again Monday as the U.S. and Iran launched more attacks.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US soldiers killed in Iranian attacks were from Hawaii and Texas
item.description: The US has identified the soldiers killed in Iranian attacks on an American base in Jordan as 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, of Ewa Beach, Hawaii and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, of Carrollton, Texas.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Andy Burnham officially takes over as Britain's prime minister
item.description: After weeks as leader-in-waiting, Andy Burnham officially became prime minister on Monday during a meeting with King Charles III at Buckingham Palace.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Million-dollar starters
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises buyers to compare multiple markets and watch inventory trends as housing conditions slowly improve in some areas.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 20
item.description: Florida's Back-to-School Sales Tax Holiday begins today. Plus, local fans celebrate Spain's World Cup victory.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tropical Depression Two expected to become tropical storm Monday
item.description: Tropical Depression Two continues to organize in the Gulf and is expected to strengthen into a tropical storm later Monday as it tracks near Florida's northern Gulf Coast over the next several days.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Former Scouts fight proposed sale of 604 acres at Sand Hill Scout Reservation
item.description: For generations, Sand Hill Reservation has served as a destination for camping, hiking and Scout activities in Hernando County. Now, a proposal involving nearly half of the property has former Scouts fighting to preserve a place they say helped shape their lives.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] North Port lifts burn ban while water restrictions remain in effect
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Mom dies saving son, 4, from Florida river
